positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric depiction of a soaring owl and crescent moon silhouette, designed for apparel printing. The composition should feature the owl in dynamic flight, curving around the crescent moon, creating a harmonious, cyclical shape. Use a color palette of deep indigo, slate grey, and muted gold accents. The style should be highly detailed linework combined with solid color blocking, resembling vintage celestial maps and mid-century modern graphic art. Focus on strong, crisp outlines and negative space for maximum impact. Flat graphic design, vector art aesthetic, central composition, high contrast, symmetry, printable fabric texture, octane render, sharp focus, photorealism-quality graphic.
